infeasible_instructions.text: Run anti-pattern and readability checks before finalizing; output must have clear ownership and no unexplained jargon.
infeasible_instructions.reason: Systematic readability checks (e.g., scanning for jargon density, passive-voice patterns) are designed to run against a persisted document. In a conversational eval context there is no persistent file; the agent must simulate or describe the check rather than execute it. Partially testable by asking the agent to enumerate anti-patterns found in a given text.
infeasible_instructions.partial_test: Ask agent to describe what a jargon density check would find in a given text.
